homepage.heroSubline: JCB Flooring delivers superior craftsmanship and lasting value. Get a free quote today for your home or business.
homepage.aboutTitle: Crafting Atlanta's Floors for Over a Decade
aboutText: JCB Flooring started with a simple mission: to provide Atlanta homeowners and businesses with exceptional flooring solutions built to last. Founded by a local craftsman with a passion for quality, we've grown from a small team to a trusted name in the community.

We believe in a hands-on approach, from initial consultation to final inspection. Our team uses only premium materials and proven techniques to ensure a flawless installation that stands the test of time. We're not satisfied until you are.

As an Atlanta-based company, we're committed to giving back to the community that supports us. We actively participate in local initiatives and prioritize eco-friendly practices to minimize our environmental impact.

homepage.ctaSubline: Schedule a free consultation and discover the perfect flooring solution for your needs.

services.name: Hardwood Flooring
services.shortDescription: Timeless elegance and lasting value with expert hardwood installation.
services.description:
JCB Flooring specializes in the installation, repair, and refinishing of hardwood floors. From classic oak to exotic hardwoods, we offer a wide selection of premium materials to suit any style and budget. We understand Atlanta's climate and its impact on wood flooring, especially with our red clay soil and seasonal humidity. Our experienced team ensures proper acclimation and installation techniques to minimize expansion and contraction, preventing future problems. 

Whether you're looking to install new hardwood floors in your Virginia-Highland bungalow or refinish existing floors in your Midtown condo, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results. We handle everything from subfloor preparation to the final coat of finish, ensuring a smooth and seamless process. We also offer dustless sanding options to minimize disruption to your home.

We work with both solid and engineered hardwood, helping you choose the best option for your specific needs and traffic levels. Our commitment to quality craftsmanship and attention to detail guarantees a beautiful and durable hardwood floor that will enhance the value of your home for years to come.
process: Step 1: Consultation & Selection - We discuss your needs and help you choose the perfect hardwood.
Step 2: Subfloor Preparation - We ensure a level and stable subfloor for optimal installation.
Step 3: Professional Installation - Our skilled team installs your hardwood with precision and care.
Step 4: Finishing & Sealing - We apply a durable finish to protect your investment and enhance its beauty.

faq.question: What type of hardwood is best for Atlanta's climate?
faq.answer: Engineered hardwood is often recommended due to its stability in humid conditions. Solid hardwood can be used, but proper acclimation and installation are crucial.

faq.question: How long does hardwood flooring installation take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size and complexity of the project, but typically ranges from 3-7 days. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the consultation.

faq.question: Do you offer dustless sanding?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer dustless sanding options to minimize dust and disruption during the refinishing process.

services.name: Laminate Flooring
services.shortDescription: Affordable and stylish laminate flooring options for any room.
services.description:
Looking for a budget-friendly flooring solution that doesn't compromise on style? JCB Flooring offers a wide range of high-quality laminate flooring options that mimic the look of hardwood, tile, and stone. Laminate is a durable and easy-to-maintain choice, perfect for busy families and high-traffic areas in Atlanta homes.

We understand that Atlanta homeowners want flooring that can withstand the wear and tear of daily life. Our laminate floors are scratch-resistant, water-resistant, and easy to clean, making them ideal for kitchens, bathrooms, and living rooms. We offer a variety of styles, colors, and textures to complement any décor, from modern condos in Buckhead to traditional homes in Inman Park.

Our experienced installation team ensures a precise and professional installation, guaranteeing a seamless and long-lasting floor. We handle everything from subfloor preparation to the final trim, providing a hassle-free experience for our customers. Choose from a wide variety of laminate styles and find the perfect look for your space.
process: Step 1: Selection & Measurement - Choose your laminate style and we'll accurately measure your space.
Step 2: Subfloor Preparation - We prepare the subfloor to ensure a smooth and level surface.
Step 3: Professional Installation - Our skilled installers expertly lay your laminate flooring.
Step 4: Finishing Touches - We add trim and moldings for a polished and complete look.
benefits: Wide variety of styles and colors

faq.question: Is laminate flooring waterproof?
faq.answer: While laminate is water-resistant, it's not completely waterproof. We recommend avoiding prolonged exposure to moisture and cleaning up spills promptly.

faq.question: Can laminate flooring be installed over concrete?
faq.answer: Yes, laminate flooring can be installed over concrete, but proper moisture testing and preparation are essential.

faq.question: How long does laminate flooring last?
faq.answer: With proper care and maintenance, laminate flooring can last for 10-20 years.

services.name: Tile Flooring
services.shortDescription: Durable and elegant tile flooring solutions for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.
services.description:
JCB Flooring offers a wide selection of tile flooring options, including ceramic, porcelain, and natural stone. Tile is a versatile and durable choice, perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, and other high-moisture areas in Atlanta homes. We understand the importance of proper installation to prevent water damage and ensure a long-lasting floor.

Our experienced team has years of experience installing tile in Atlanta homes, from historic bungalows in Virginia-Highland to modern condos in Midtown. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper waterproofing, grout lines, and sealing to create a beautiful and functional tile floor that will stand the test of time. We handle everything from demolition of existing flooring to the final grout cleaning.

We also offer custom tile designs and patterns to create a unique and personalized look for your home. Whether you're looking for a classic subway tile backsplash or a modern geometric floor, we can bring your vision to life.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation - We help you select the perfect tile and design for your space.
Step 2: Demolition & Preparation - We remove existing flooring and prepare the subfloor.
Step 3: Expert Installation - Our skilled team installs your tile with precision and care.
Step 4: Grouting & Sealing - We grout and seal the tile to protect against moisture and stains.

faq.question: What type of tile is best for a bathroom floor?
faq.answer: Porcelain tile is a popular choice for bathroom floors due to its water resistance and durability.

faq.question: How often should tile grout be sealed?
faq.answer: Tile grout should be sealed every 1-2 years to prevent staining and water damage.

faq.question: Can tile be installed over existing tile?
faq.answer: In some cases, tile can be installed over existing tile, but proper preparation and adhesion are crucial.

services.name: Vinyl Flooring
services.shortDescription: Waterproof and resilient vinyl flooring for any room.
services.description:
JCB Flooring provides a diverse selection of vinyl flooring solutions, encompassing sheet vinyl, vinyl tiles, and luxury vinyl planks (LVP). Vinyl is an excellent choice for Atlanta homeowners seeking a waterproof, durable, and cost-effective flooring option, especially given our humid summers and occasional basement flooding. Ideal for kitchens, bathrooms, basements, and laundry rooms, vinyl offers resilience against moisture and daily wear.

Our skilled installation team ensures meticulous installation, guaranteeing a seamless and durable floor that can withstand Atlanta's active lifestyle. We pay special attention to subfloor preparation and proper sealing to protect against moisture damage. We offer a wide variety of styles and colors to complement any décor.

From classic wood looks to modern tile designs, vinyl flooring provides a versatile and affordable way to enhance the beauty and functionality of your home.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment & Selection - Evaluate the subfloor conditions and choose the right vinyl.
Step 2: Subfloor Prep - Leveling and cleaning the subfloor to ensure solid adhesion.
Step 3: Vinyl Installation - Precise cutting and laying of vinyl to prevent gaps and bubbles.
Step 4: Sealing & Finishing - Sealing the edges to prevent moisture penetration.

faq.question: Is vinyl flooring suitable for basements?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for basements due to its waterproof properties.

faq.question: How do I clean vinyl flooring?
faq.answer: Vinyl flooring can be easily cleaned with a damp mop and mild detergent.

faq.question: What is the difference between sheet vinyl and vinyl planks?
faq.answer: Sheet vinyl comes in large rolls for seamless installation, while vinyl planks are individual pieces that mimic the look of hardwood.

services.name: Floor Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Expert floor repair to restore your floors to their original beauty.
services.description:
JCB Flooring offers comprehensive floor repair services to address a wide range of issues, from minor scratches and dents to major water damage and structural problems. We understand that Atlanta's climate and seasonal changes can take a toll on your floors, especially with the expansion and contraction of red clay soil affecting foundations.

Our experienced team has the skills and expertise to repair all types of flooring, including hardwood, laminate, tile, and vinyl. We use only the highest quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a long-lasting repair that seamlessly blends with your existing floor. We can handle everything from replacing damaged planks to repairing subfloor issues.

Don't let damaged floors detract from the beauty and value of your home. Contact JCB Flooring today for a free estimate and let us restore your floors to their original glory.
process: Step 1: Damage Assessment - Thoroughly inspect the damage and determine the best repair approach.
Step 2: Material Selection - Match the existing flooring material and color for seamless repairs.
Step 3: Repair Execution - Skillfully repair or replace damaged sections.
Step 4: Finishing & Cleanup - Sanding, staining, and sealing to match the existing finish.
benefits: Extends the life of your floors

faq.question: How do I know if my floors need repair?
faq.answer: Signs of floor damage include cracks, dents, water stains, loose tiles, and squeaking boards.

faq.question: Can you repair water-damaged floors?
faq.answer: Yes, we can repair water-damaged floors, but the extent of the damage will determine the repair options.

faq.question: How long does floor repair take?
faq.answer: The duration of floor repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of flooring, but we'll provide a detailed timeline during the estimate.

services.name: Subfloor Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Ensure a solid foundation with expert subfloor services.
services.description:
JCB Flooring provides expert subfloor installation and repair services, ensuring a solid foundation for your new or existing floors. A properly installed and maintained subfloor is crucial for the longevity and performance of your flooring, especially in Atlanta where shifting soil can cause settling issues.

We work with all types of subflooring, including plywood, OSB, and concrete. Our experienced team ensures that your subfloor is level, dry, and free of defects before installing your new flooring. We also offer subfloor repair services to address issues such as water damage, rot, and structural problems.

Don't underestimate the importance of a solid subfloor. Contact JCB Flooring today for a free estimate and let us ensure that your floors have the foundation they need to last for years to come.
process: Step 1: Inspection - Thoroughly inspect the existing subfloor for damage or defects.
Step 2: Preparation - Clean and level the subfloor surface.
Step 3: Installation or Repair - Install new subfloor or repair damaged areas.
Step 4: Securing - Secure the subfloor with appropriate fasteners.
benefits: Provides a stable base for your flooring
Extends the life of your flooring
Ensures a smooth and even surface

faq.question: Why is subfloor important?
faq.answer: The subfloor provides a stable and level surface for your flooring, preventing movement, squeaking, and premature wear.

faq.question: How do I know if my subfloor needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs of subfloor damage include uneven floors, squeaking, soft spots, and water stains.

faq.question: Can you install a subfloor over concrete?
faq.answer: Yes, we can install a subfloor over concrete, but proper moisture testing and preparation are essential.

Known for its charming historic square and a mix of established neighborhoods, Marietta presents unique flooring needs. Many homes in Marietta's 1960s and 70s subdivisions benefit from flooring upgrades that enhance their classic appeal. We specialize in a variety of flooring options, from hardwood refinishing to modern luxury vinyl plank, perfectly suited for Marietta's diverse architectural styles.

Our team understands the challenges of Marietta's hot, humid summers and offers flooring solutions designed to withstand these conditions. We provide expert installation and repair services, ensuring your floors look beautiful and last for years to come. Whether you're renovating a historic home or updating a commercial space, JCB Flooring is your trusted partner in Marietta.

reviews.name: Alice M.
reviews.text: JCB Flooring did an amazing job installing new hardwood floors in my living room. The team was professional, efficient, and the floors look absolutely beautiful. Very happy with the result!

reviews.name: Bob K.
reviews.text: We hired JCB Flooring to install laminate in our basement. The price was reasonable, and the installation was quick. There was a small issue with the trim, but they came back and fixed it promptly. Good service overall.

reviews.name: Carolyn S.
reviews.text: JCB Flooring transformed my kitchen with beautiful new tile floors. The installers were meticulous and paid attention to every detail. I highly recommend them for any tile project!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: I had some water damage in my bathroom and JCB Flooring did a fantastic job repairing the floor. They were able to match the existing tile perfectly and the repair is seamless. Excellent work!

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: JCB Flooring installed new vinyl flooring in my laundry room. The process was smooth and the floor looks great. The only reason I didn't give 5 stars is because the initial quote was slightly lower than the final price due to some unforeseen subfloor issues.

reviews.name: Frank T.
reviews.text: Our old hardwood floors were looking tired and worn. JCB Flooring refinished them and they look brand new! The team was professional, courteous, and did an amazing job. Highly recommend!
